Class RmiLoginRequest

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RmiLoginRequest extends Object implements Serializable
DTO for RMI login requests.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RmiLoginRequest()
    Default constructor for serialization frameworks.
    RmiLoginRequest(String nickname)
    Creates a simple login request (Legacy).
    RmiLoginRequest(String type, String nickname, int roomID, String pin)
    Creates a login request with room ID and PIN.
    RmiLoginRequest(String type, String nickname, int roomID, String pin, int maxPlayers)
    Creates a login request with room ID, PIN, and room size.

  • Constructor Details

    • RmiLoginRequest

      public RmiLoginRequest()
      Default constructor for serialization frameworks.

    • RmiLoginRequest

      public RmiLoginRequest(String nickname)
      Creates a simple login request (Legacy).
      Parameters:
      nickname - desired nickname.

    • RmiLoginRequest

      public RmiLoginRequest(String type, String nickname, int roomID, String pin)
      Creates a login request with room ID and PIN.
      Parameters:
      type - The login action type (e.g., "CREATE_ROOM", "JOIN_ROOM", "RECONNECT_ROOM").
      nickname - desired nickname.
      roomID - the room ID to join or create.
      pin - the secret PIN for connection/reconnection.

    • RmiLoginRequest

      public RmiLoginRequest(String type, String nickname, int roomID, String pin, int maxPlayers)
      Creates a login request with room ID, PIN, and room size.
      Parameters:
      type - The login action type (e.g., "CREATE_ROOM", "JOIN_ROOM", "RECONNECT_ROOM").
      nickname - desired nickname.
      roomID - the room ID to join or create.
      pin - the secret PIN for connection/reconnection.
      maxPlayers - number of players requested for room creation.

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns:
      the login action type.

    • setType

      public void setType(String type)
      Parameters:
      type - the login action type.

      public String getNickname()
      Returns:
      requested nickname.

      public void setNickname(String nickname)
      Parameters:
      nickname - requested nickname.

    • getRoomID

      public int getRoomID()
      Returns:
      requested room ID.

    • setRoomID

      public void setRoomID(int roomID)
      Parameters:
      roomID - requested room ID.

    • getPin

      public String getPin()
      Returns:
      secret PIN.

    • setPin

      public void setPin(String pin)
      Parameters:
      pin - secret PIN.

    • getMaxPlayers

      public int getMaxPlayers()
      Returns:
      number of players requested when creating a room.

    • setMaxPlayers

      public void setMaxPlayers(int maxPlayers)
      Parameters:
      maxPlayers - number of players requested when creating a room.
